title: Unique Dark x Numbered Hotbar
description: Hotbar In Bedrock theme + numbers in bars
body:
English:


![The idea](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fd1ff1e01aad2df583469619f9450cb4f5d7bbb.jpeg)

**ITS RESOURCE PACK NOT UPDATE!**
Why? Because its a **full version!**


This Resource Pack is compatible with [UDH](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/unique-dark-hotbar-add-on) And [NH](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/numbered-hotbar)


The Original Authors: Dass_Joy and amongstreality
The idea: A-10 (me)



Русский:


![Идея](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fd1ff1e01aad2df583469619f9450cb4f5d7bbb.jpeg)

**Этот ресурс не будет обновлятся!!**
Почему потому это *Вся версия!*

Этот Ресурс пак совместим С [UDH](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/unique-dark-hotbar-add-on) И c [NH](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/numbered-hotbar)





Оригинал авторы (Остатки Ресурсов): Dass_Joy И amongstreality
Идея Ресурса: A-10 (me)
